items.title: Despite a $400 million net worth and Hollywood career, Reese Witherspoon tells young people to stop chasing their dreams—and do this instead
items.description: Reese Witherspoon is telling young people to stop romanticizing the “dream job” and start getting brutally honest about what they’re actually good at.

items.title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai says AI spending still makes sense despite bubble fears
items.description: The Google CEO touched down in New Delhi this week with a string of new India investments in tow.

items.title: Bill Gates pulls out of India’s AI summit at the last minute in the latest blow to an event dogged by organizational chaos
items.description: The Microsoft founder's abrupt withdrawal, amid renewed scrutiny over his ties to Jeffrey Epstein, capped a chaotic few days for an event already dogg...

items.title: Elon Musk is pushing to build data centers in space. But they won’t solve AI’s power problems anytime soon
items.description: Proponents say orbital data centers could solve AI’s power and cooling crunch. Experts say that vision is far more distant than the hype suggests.

items.title: Who is OpenClaw creator Peter Steinberger? The millennial developer caught the attention of Sam Altman and Mark Zuckerberg
items.description: Steinberger made $100M off his first company and quit coding. Now he’s back to show the world the “magic” of agentic AI.
